channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Survey Finds One in Five Recent Graduates Regret Their College Major
item.description: A ZipRecruiter report found that approximately one in five recent college graduates express regret over the academic major they chose to pursue.

item.title: Teenager Arrested Following Fatal Shooting at Mall of Louisiana
item.description: Police said the shooting followed an altercation between two groups in the mall's food court, resulting in a fatality and a teen suspect taken into custody.

item.title: Tornado Damages Around 40 Homes in Oklahoma and Forces Road Closures
item.description: A powerful tornado caused damage to approximately 40 homes in one Oklahoma county, prompting emergency crews to conduct door-to-door welfare checks in affected areas.

item.title: Trump Extends Jones Act Waiver for an Additional 90 Days
item.description: The extended waiver allows international vessels to transport goods between US ports, a measure the administration says is aimed at reducing domestic energy costs.

item.title: Witkoff and Kushner to Travel to Islamabad Saturday for Iran Peace Discussions
item.description: President Trump announced major joint US-Israeli strikes against Iran on February 28, and diplomatic efforts are now focused on reaching a ceasefire agreement.
